keyAdditions: Product-style README front door with lightweight prompt and links to the strict USAGE.md run instructions

Moltbook-style skill.md handoff for sending an AI agent directly to the kit

Positioning page reframed around trying Drupal CMS with an AI coding agent and keeping the result reviewable
README quickstart with three required inputs, local-agent requirement, and copy-paste escape hatch
START.md one-screen onboarding with prerequisites, workspace topology, one prompt, four moves, and stake-my-name review bar
